name: Bhagavad Gita
description: A sacred dialogue between Lord Krishna and Arjuna on duty, righteousness, action, and liberation.

name: Ramayana
description: One of the great epics of Sanatan Dharma narrating the life and ideals of Lord Rama.

name: Upanishads
description: Philosophical teachings exploring consciousness, reality, and the nature of the self.

name: Mahabharata
description: An epic exploration of dharma, ethics, governance, and human nature.
